title: notodanthonia eriantha
intro: Notodanthonia eriantha, also known as the prickly rice grass, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Notodanthonia eriantha include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Notodanthonia eriantha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
